sections.heading: Structure
sections.content: Role defined, goal clear, objective stated, constraints listed

sections.heading: Design (UI/UX)
sections.content: Platform specified, 3+ keywords, animation library named, mobile-first

sections.heading: Technical
sections.content: Stack specified, output format requested, WCAG AA, 60fps budget

sections.heading: Quality
sections.content: No vague words, refinement included, interaction metaphor defined, JSON rules appended

sections.heading: Prompt Scoring Dimensions
sections.content: Clarity (10), Structure (10), Constraints (10), Predictability (10), Overall (10)

sections.heading: Scoring Formula
sections.content: Overall = (Clarity + Structure + Constraints + Predictability) / 4

sections.heading: Score Interpretation
sections.content: 9-10 production ready, 7-8 good gaps, 5-6 partial, 3-4 weak, 1-2 start over
